data.description:

data.title: Oklahoma Man Sentenced to Five Years for $9.4M Crypto Ponzi Scheme
data.description:
Travis Ford, a 36-year-old resident of Glenpool, Oklahoma, has been sentenced to five years in federal prison for orchestrating a multimillion-dollar cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme. The sentencing took place on November 14, 2025, following Ford’s earlier guilty plea to a single count of conspiracy to commit wire fraud. How the Scheme Operated Ford served as the […] The post Oklahoma Man Sentenced to Five Years for $9
source: https://www.ethnews.com/oklahoma-man-sentenced-to-five-years-for-9-4m-crypto-ponzi-scheme/

data.title: Bitcoin bull run ‘might actually be over’ as Wyckoff pattern points to $86K
data.description:
The oft-cited Wyckoff pattern suggests that Bitcoin price could be headed toward $86,000 next, especially if BTC fails to hold $94,000, which is the average cost basis of 6 to 12-month Bitcoin holders.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bull-run-might-actually-be-over-as-wyckoff-pattern-points-to-dollar86k?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fnc%3D1763141292369%26_q%3D1763141292369%26vfff%3D1763141292%26noCache%3Dtrue&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Weekly Crypto Regulation Roundup: Stablecoin Boom, CFTC Power Moves, and Senate Shake-Ups
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/weekly-crypto-regulation-roundup-stablecoin-boom-cftc-power-moves-and-senate-shake-ups/
